what_it_does: Records an image attachment for the design-assets channel, pointing to the icon asset at image://design-assets/icons/Users4.
observations: YAML frontmatter with no body content
target uses an image:// URI scheme
standouts: References a specific icon asset named Users4
Uses an image:// URI for the target
notes: A ledger-style attachment record that links the design-assets channel to the Users4 icon image.
questions: Where is the actual image file stored relative to the image:// URI?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears to be an attachment registration record and it does register an image attachment, matching its stated purpose.
intention_signals: To track and make discoverable image assets attached to a channel by recording a stable id, channel, type, target URI, and timestamp.
contribution: Provides a lightweight, timestamped attachment record that maps a channel to a specific image asset location.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file registering an images-type attachment with id att-53b18fd5 in the design-assets channel, targeting image://design-assets/icons/Users4 and recording an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog the Users4 icon image asset as an attachment associated with the design-assets channel.
